description: SB Creative has two raw files: 月次の前払印税報告書 PDF (line items + MG table) and 支払通知書 eom PDF (monthly cash summary).

series_rollup.comment: Strip volume markers and 分冊版 subtitle to get a single family per series.

known_families: 売られた花嫁は義家族に溺愛される
皇帝になるので離婚してください
暴君皇帝と離婚します
アカデミーの天才剣士
notes: Per-title rows on page 1–2 look like: `<TITLE> ¥<amount>` — they are tax-inclusive.
The MG table on the last page lists one row per MG title with current-period draw (¥当期MG取崩額).
GT emits one row per base family where (Σrows - MGdraw) > 0. In practice only the dominant family survives.
